description: A reader that is already fully synced should produce zero new writes and no errors when sync runs a second time.

assertions.description: Reader ends with the same verified object set as the seed after first sync.
Reader replay hash matches the seed after first sync.
Reader accepted heads match the seed after first sync.
Second sync pass writes zero new objects and completes without errors.

notes: Proves that sync pull is safe to run repeatedly without side effects.
Verifies the re-sync idempotency sub-item of the M4 production replication behavior scope.
